Class OverlayController

java.lang.Object
scorefour.controller.OverlayController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Controllable, Interactable
public class OverlayController extends Object implements Controllable, Interactable
OverlayController manages the in game overlay interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.

It coordinates the OverlayView and ButtonController to render and control the in game overlay.

  • Field Details

    • mouseOver

      protected boolean mouseOver

  • Constructor Details

    • OverlayController

      public OverlayController(Rectangle bounds, OverlayView view)
      Constructs a OverlayController object with the given Rectangle bounds and OverlayView.

      Initializes the button components to be displayed on the overlay.

      Parameters:
      bounds - the size of the interactable overlay
      view - the overlay view to be displayed

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Updates all components which may change in the OverlayController.

      Raises the OverlayView when the MouseInputs detect that the mouse is over the overlay.

      Specified by:
      update in interface Controllable

    • mousePressed

      public void mousePressed(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with ButtonController when a mouse button has been pressed.
      Specified by:
      mousePressed in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse press status

    • mouseReleased

      public void mouseReleased(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with ButtonController to set the GameState depending on the button released.
      Specified by:
      mouseReleased in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse release status

    • mouseMoved

      public void mouseMoved(MouseEvent e)
      Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
      Specified by:
      mouseMoved in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the new mouse position

    • setMouseOver

      public void setMouseOver(boolean mouseOver)
      Informs the OverlayController that the mouse is over its bounds.
      Parameters:
      mouseOver - true if the mouse is over the overlay; false otherwise

    • isIn

      public boolean isIn(MouseEvent e)
      Detects if the MouseInputs is in the overlays bounds.
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the current mouse position
      Returns:
      true if the cursor is inside the overlay; false otherwise

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the OverlayView and ButtonController's.
      Parameters:
      g - the Graphics context used for rendering
